race.description: Woopi & Co Accounting Country Boosted F&M Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: FANCY SHOULDER (10) is a five-year-old mare who is having her first run for the Daniel Wheeler barn. Has ratings in South Australia that line up well for this and she strips fitter for a trial win. Can make a bright start in the new colours. ON MY COMMAND (2) pushed forward last time and boxed on gamely into third at Grafton. Will again be prominent from the outset and is well placed for another big run. EVIL LOVER (9) finally broke through fresh and has been thereabouts since without striking. Has a good turn of foot and if she's close at the turn she will take some stopping. DIAMONDSAREMIO (6) has struggled of late but has prior form that can measure up. Can sneak a minor spot.
